RP-RD2-02: Resettable break-glass manual call point for indoor installation. Surface or flush mount. Function – manual alarm signal initiation; push-to-activate with simulated glass-break tactile feedback, key reset. Reinforced polycarbonate housing with integral back box. SPC switching mechanism (single-pole), silver-plated contacts. 3A@125–250VAC. Cable entry 0.5–2.5 mm². 87×87×58/23 mm. Marking – fire pictogram included.
